channel.title: The Quietus – Album of the Week
channel.description: Album of the Week reviews from The Quietus.

item.title: Reach for the Scars: Cicatrizes Do Futuro by Deafkids
item.description: Drawing inspiration from the carnival-esque rituals of Bumba Meu Boi, the Brazilian duo find paths to the future in ancient rhythms, not far-off galaxies

item.title: In the Shadow of the Bomb: Heavy Water by Magic Tuber Stringband
item.description: Magic Tuber Stringband’s first LP as a trio is a work of unruly beauty that doubles as a cautionary tale, says Bernie Brooks

item.title: Shatterproof: Sam Hoyek’s Demonstration 01: Anomalous
item.description: An album of sonic and metaphysical skirmishes from the Syrian-born, Montreal-based experimental musician

item.title: Crisis Energy: Extinction Burst! by Guttersnipe
item.description: Back after an eight-year album gap, the Leeds duo have met the moment, matching the scale of our psychic overwhelm with an album of more-than-human intensity

item.title: Close Voices, Moving Lives: Oblivion Seekers by Ben Vida
item.description: Following a series of journeys in tech-abstraction, the American composer swerves towards the analogue and the limpid presence of the human voice

item.title: Maramfa Musick Pro: Serokolo 7 Resurrects the Frenetic Pulse of Mapanta
item.description: On his new album, Maramfa Musick Pro, the 27-year-old South African producer bypasses the polished globalism of modern club music to deliver a raw, ancestral, and intensely localised masterpiece

item.title: Thickened Moments: Life Day by Kristen Gallerneaux
item.description: Suffused with birdsong and seemingly haunted acoustic instruments, the new album from the Michigan-based artist and curator evokes the eerie sonics of the hospital ward, finds Joel Stern

item.title: Kinetic Energy: Seismo by Upsammy & Valentina Magaletti
item.description: Originally commissioned by Amsterdam's Rijksmuseum, this collaboration between the Amsterdam-based producer and ther UK's busiest drummer opens up dazzling worlds of percussive sound
